channel.title: by.foro Journal
channel.description: Fashion, interiors, beauty and culture selected by by.foro.

item.title: The Fall 2026 Fashion Trends Worth Wearing
item.description: Five runway ideas with life beyond the runway: precise tailoring, useful shirts, velvet and colour with consequence.

item.title: The Perfume That Stays Close
item.description: What skin scent means, which notes create it and how to wear one.

item.title: The Room That Asks You to Listen
item.description: Good sound, low light and a record collection you actually play.

item.title: Whimsical Interiors Without the Theme
item.description: How to add wit and character without turning a home into a theme.

item.title: Literary Chic Without the Costume
item.description: A sharper, less literal way to wear the current bookish fashion mood.

item.title: The Most Beautiful Kitchen Colour Combinations Right Now
item.description: Ten palettes that give cabinetry, stone and timber more depth and permanence.

item.title: Dressing With Intention, Not Urgency
item.description: A quieter approach to personal style built around proportion, repetition and self-knowledge.

item.title: The Vanity Table as a Still Life
item.description: Why the objects we keep close can be useful, intimate and visually exact at once.

item.title: Taste Is Built, Not Found
item.description: A case for looking longer, collecting references and resisting instant certainty.
